overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a first-person walk through the historic city of Saint Denis. The player traverses narrow brick alleyways with tropical vegetation, courtyards with NPCs, a dark interior corridor, and emerges onto a covered sidewalk with a passing tram. The environment features distinctive New Orleans-style architecture with brick buildings, archways, and balconies during golden hour lighting.

wet stone tiles covering the ground
vibrant red tropical flowers in planters
stacked wooden crates against the wall
stone steps leading up to a building entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed alleyway with weathered brick walls covered in vines. The camera moves forward past tropical vegetation with red flowers and wooden crates, approaching stone stairs on the right. The atmosphere is quiet and empty with natural diffused lighting filtering between the buildings.

turning right to pass through large brick archway

man in overalls standing near the wall observing

stack of sandbags near the wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more open courtyard with brick archways. The camera passes through the archway near an outdoor brick oven and sandbags. Two NPCs are visible - a woman sweeping and a man standing nearby. The ground changes to cobblestone and the space feels more open while remaining enclosed by walls.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a larger courtyard featuring a prominent two-story colonial building with a white wooden balcony. The ground is paved with stone tiles and large potted plants decorate the area. Several NPCs stand around the courtyard as the camera approaches a dark entrance to the building, with lighting beginning to dim.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark narrow corridor with light at end

events.description: entering dark corridor from bright courtyard, visibility drops significantly
approaching bright exit at end of tunnel, light increasing

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark dusty corridor toward the light at the exit

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts dramatically as the camera enters a dark narrow corridor with rough stone walls. Visibility is very low with only light from the distant exit illuminating the dust particles in the air. Wooden crates are stacked along the walls. The camera moves steadily toward the bright exit at the end of the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with historic storefronts and tram line

vintage tram passing by on the street to the left

man in blue shirt standing near the street curb

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark corridor onto a covered sidewalk with a view of a historic street. A vintage tram passes by on the left while pedestrians walk along the sidewalk. The environment features brick buildings with green awnings and street lamps. The lighting is mixed with shadows from the canopy and golden hour sunlight from the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, vine-covered alleyway through a series of courtyards and a dark tunnel, finally emerging into a bustling city street. It begins by gliding past weathered brick walls and tropical red flowers toward stone stairs in a quiet, diffused light. As the camera passes through a brick archway, the space opens into a cobblestone courtyard where NPCs are seen working near an outdoor oven, before expanding further into a larger plaza featuring a colonial building with a white wooden balcony and potted plants. The scene then shifts dramatically as the camera enters a dim, narrow stone corridor filled with dust particles, moving steadily toward a bright light at the far end. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness onto a covered sidewalk, where the lighting turns to a golden hour glow as a vintage tram passes by pedestrians and brick buildings with green awnings.
